summary: Persistent knowledge accumulation + arXiv synthetic atom injection + recursive multi-epoch. 0 substantive niche across 4 epochs but 3 new root causes (RC_006/007/008) + 1 terminal constraint (RC_009) documented in persistent_knowledge_base.json. arXiv injection ESCAPED RC_002 NARROW_INPUT_POOL at the raw level (15 vs 0 survivors at L8 epoch 1).
phases: phase_0: persistent_knowledge_base.json initialized with 5 Run-9 RCs + 6 counter-papers + 5 fixes
phase_1: arxiv_atom_injector.py built; 30 hot-topic atoms across 10 ML frontier topics (15 web_search calls)
phase_2_epoch_1: arXiv hot injection; 15 L8 survivors; ALL saturated (4 saturation web_search)
phase_R_epoch_2: cold-topic injection (6 new atoms); 19 L8 survivors with 4 cold-bearing; ALL saturated (4 web_search)
phase_R_epoch_3: cross-disciplinary injection (6 new atoms); 19 L8 survivors, 0 cross-disc due to RC_008 vocab bias (3 web_search)
phase_R_epoch_4: mechanism vocab expansion (+7 cross-disc axes); 32 L8 survivors with 3 cross-disc + 9 cold-bearing; ALL saturated (4 web_search). Max epoch terminal.
phase_3_audit: Belinda 3Q audit on top 3 candidates by diversity score. All PASS mechanically.
phase_5_cross_llm: 4 entries queued for cross-LLM novelty re-check
binding_constraint_verdict: RC_002 NARROW_INPUT_POOL escaped at raw level; literature density (RC_006/007/008/009) is the new terminal binding.
